name: Bushwhack
description: Bushwhack is a tree elf who is one of the Life Trap Masters in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Born to a race of tree elves who were protectors of the rich Arcadian Timberland, Bushwhack was supposed to be a ranger. But being the smallest of his clan, he was sent deep into the woods by the Chieftain to study with Arbo, known for helping the Skylanders rebuild the Core of Light. The tree spirit looked beyond Bushwhack's size, and seeing that he had the heart of a warrior, taught him many secrets. Arbo even gifted him with an enchanted axe. So when a legion of Lumberjack Trolls invaded the forest and overpowered the elves, it was Bushwhack who set out to stop them. Drawing out the trolls, he used his enchanted axe and knowledge of the forest to capture them and destroy their tree-cutting machines. Afterward, Bushwhack not only was made a ranger but a Skylander. As part of the Trap Team, he now uses his Traptanium axe to whack evil wherever it grows!
personality: Bushwhack has a warrior's heart in a tiny elf body. Size doesn't matter when it comes to his passion for heroism.

story.content: Born to a race of tree elves who were protectors of the rich Arcadian Timberland, Bushwhack was supposed to be a ranger. But being the smallest of his clan, he was sent deep into the woods by the Chieftain to study with Arbo, known for helping the Skylanders rebuild the Core of Light. The tree spirit looked beyond Bushwhack's size, and seeing that he had the heart of a warrior, taught him many secrets. Arbo even gifted him with an enchanted axe. So when a legion of Lumberjack Trolls invaded the forest and overpowered the elves, it was Bushwhack who set out to stop them. Drawing out the trolls, he used his enchanted axe and knowledge of the forest to capture them and destroy their tree-cutting machines. Afterward, Bushwhack not only was made a ranger but a Skylander. As part of the Trap Team, he now uses his Traptanium axe to whack evil wherever it grows!

content: Nature protect me! - when using Bushes Shack
Timber! - when using Soul Gem ability
Back in action! - when switched in
Nature's bounty! - when opening a treasure chest
Nature is calling! - when Traptanium Axe glows
Over the edge! - when leveling up
Looks like I'm a natural! - when checking stats
My very own canopy! - when wearing a hat
An edgy new look for me!

trivia: Bushwhack is also a word for cutting or chopping down foliage to clear a path.
He is the only elven Skylander to have pupils and colored sclera.
As it appears, Bushwhack doesn't wear shoes. So he is also the only elven Skylander to be walking around barefoot.
Bushwhack is the second elven Skylander of the Life element, the first one being Stealth Elf. In addition, they both have Legendary counterparts.
He is voiced by Roger Craig Smith, who is known for being the current voice actor of Sonic the Hedgehog. Roger also voices Da Pinchy, and the Air SWAP Force Skylander, Boom Jet.
He and Jawbreaker are the only Trap Masters to have Legendary counterparts.
He, Voodood and Chopscotch use axes for weapons.
He, Stump Smash and Chompy Mage all use acorns to attack enemies. Stink Bomb also uses acorns to attack if his 'The Art of Acorns' upgrade path is chosen.
Despite numerous sources referencing his small stature, in game Bushwhack is actually taller than most other Skylanders.
Bushwhack was one of the many Skylanders planned to appear in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes. Before the game's closure, only concept art of his Awakened Form was released.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Bushwhack's Soul Gem Preview (Axe to the Max)

basic.name: Traptanium Axe
basic.content: Press Button 1 to swing the Traptanium Axe. Press Button 1, 1 and hold 1 for a combo attack.

basic.name: Mystic Acorn
basic.content: Throw a Mystic Acorn that stuns enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Headbash
basic_upgrades.content: Press Button 3 for a powerful Headbash move, damaging anything nearby.

basic_upgrades.name: Nut Grenade!
basic_upgrades.content: Acorns now explode on impact, doing more damage.

basic_upgrades.name: In a Nut Shell
basic_upgrades.content: Get some new armor, taking reduced damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Thorn Tail
basic_upgrades.content: Traptanium Axe attack now leaves a trail of thorns that damage enemies.

soulgems.name: Timber!
soulgems.content: Jump and hold Button 3 to plant a giant tree, which is then cut down to smash whatever's below.

abilities.name: Combo Attacks
abilities.content: Press Button 1, 1 and hold 2 for the Slash and Spin combo, and Button 2, 2 and hold 3 for Head first combo.

abilities.name: Go Nuts!
abilities.content: Keep holding Button 3 after a Slash and Spin combo to shoot nuts in all directions.

abilities.name: Bush's Shack
abilities.content: Hold Button 2 to create a leafy hut for protection and healing.

abilities.name: Primal Warrior
abilities.content: Get new armor, taking reduced damage and doing extra damage with the Headbash Attack.

abilities.name: Spring Forward
abilities.content: Hold Button 3 to dash forward and perform a super Headbash attack.
